discussion_comments.comment_body:
Should be triple-quoted

```suggestion
          notes: """
            # Title
            - bullet
          """
```

I suggest replace with 
```suggestion
  for (const [id, styles] of entries(parsedGlobalRules.styles)) {
```
to remove redundant `if` clause in `for`

or even
```ts
globalRules.styles = pipe(
  entries(parsedGlobalRules.styles),
  map(([id,style]) => ({id, style})),
  indexBy(prop('id'))
)
```

Thanks for this solution! I spent long time trying to figure out how to do this in TypeScript. Finally I gave up.

I'll get familiar with this library. Now I have no clue how it works. But the tests are passing :)

discussion_comments.comment_body:
I suggest to use [`@mantine/colors-generator`](https://github.com/mantinedev/mantine/blob/master/packages/%40mantine/colors-generator/src/generate-colors.ts#L44C17-L44C31)

This is how it works: https://mantine.dev/colors-generator/

Why?
Initially I used tailwind, and picked colors manually, thats why I have these constants here. I am not good in knowing the aspects, and seems picking something like [Open Colors](https://yeun.github.io/open-color/), [Radix](https://www.radix-ui.com/colors) or [Adobe Spectrum](https://spectrum.adobe.com/page/color-system/)

At least for now I suggest to stay with mantine scale.
